channel.title: Copley Family Research Vault
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family Research Vault

item.title: CLAUDE
item.description: CLAUDE.md — Copley Family Research Vault This file gives AI agents instant orientation for working on this project.

item.title: GEMINI
item.description: Gemini Agent Protocol — Copley Family Research Vault This document provides foundational mandates for AI agents working on the Copley Family Research Vault.

item.title: Phase 2C Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2C Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) Critical Site Fixes Performed The site was “broken” due to environment and configuration issues.

item.title: Phase 2D Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2D Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) Work Completed This Session Image Catalog Completed All 11 previously unnamed images have been renamed, identified, and embedded in the appropriate pages.

item.title: Phase 2E Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2E Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) Critical Site Fix The site was serving an empty RSS feed at the root URL — no content pages at all.

item.title: Phase 2F Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2F Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) GEDCOM Data Incorporated An Ancestry.com GEDCOM export (Copley Family Tree.ged) from a Discord contact (“sp_edward_iv”) was found in C:\Users\zach\Desktop\cleanup\Copley Family Geneology.

item.title: Phase 2G Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2G Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) User Request Tom Copley (G25) shared 30 emails and 2 PDFs from his research correspondence with Steve Copley (G25), conducted February–March 2026, investigating the English and Irish origins of Michael Copley Sr.

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Copley Family Research — Changelog A running record of significant additions, corrections, and improvements to this wiki.

item.title: Ann Marie Arena
item.description: Ann Marie Arena (Swett) 📊 View Family Tree for visual context.

item.title: Benjamin Partlow
item.description: Benjamin Partlow (c. 1762–after 1834) 📊 View Family Tree for visual context.
